framework.name: AP2 is Google+Coinbase open protocol, not just a design doc
framework.description: AP2 launched by Google in collaboration with Coinbase and 60+ organizations. Has reference implementations (Python, Android), runnable samples across issuer/agent/merchant roles, and integrates x402 stablecoin rails. Not vapor — has shipped code, but no evidence of production transaction volume.
framework.raw_quote: an open protocol launched by Google in collaboration with Coinbase and over 60 organizations
